name: Seafood Tetrazinni
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Cooked crab and shrimp mixture
1/2 cup Grated Parmesan or Romano cheese
8 oz Vermicelli (broken into 2-inch lengths, cooked and drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large skillet; add 1/4 cup butter. When foam subsides, saute scallions until soft.
2. Stir in flour, coating well. Whisk in stock, clam juice, wine, cream, basil, and seafood mixture.
3. Stir in remaining cheese and set aside.
4. In the same skillet, saute mushrooms over remaining butter until they are aromatic.
5. Add garlic and cook until it releases its aroma.
6. Combine the mushroom mixture with the seafood mixture and season with salt and pepper.
7. Add vermicelli and mix well.
8. Pour into a buttered 9 X 13 baking dish.
9. Top with remaining cheese.
10. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for 15 minutes.
